content: MobileSAM: ~66x smaller and 5-38x faster than original SAM, 5.78M param image encoder (vs 632M in SAM), keeps compatibility with SAM's point/box prompt decoder without retraining -- good accuracy tradeoff. EdgeSAM: 37x faster than SAM on NVIDIA 2080Ti, 7x faster than MobileSAM on iPhone 14, 9.6M param encoder / 22.1 GFLOPs, best raw speed for prompt-based iterative refinement on edge/mobile hardware. Both target static image single-prompt segmentation (no video/tracking). SAM2 itself, even on MPS, is markedly heavier (hiera_large ~224M params) but adds video tracking and improved accuracy/consistency over SAM1-based MobileSAM/EdgeSAM. For a one-click-per-photo desktop workflow (not mobile/edge-constrained, not real-time video), SAM2's accuracy edge outweighs MobileSAM/EdgeSAM's speed edge since only a few images per session need processing interactively.
